mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and other tyrosine kinases, suppressing AML proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for HCC/RCC/thyroid; robust activity in FLT3-ITD lines including MOLM-13 and MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits BCR-ABL and FLT3 (including resistant FLT3 mutants)
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; active in MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and other RTKs to suppress AML cell proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/GIST; SU11248 in early literature

mechanism: SYK inhibition via active metabolite R406 reduces AML growth/survival
additional_notes: Approved for ITP; R406 is the active metabolite; activity shown in MOLM-13

mechanism: 26S proteasome inhibition induces apoptosis and cell-cycle arrest
additional_notes: Active in AML lines including MOLM-13; combinable with cytarabine/anthracyclines

mechanism: Irreversible 20S proteasome inhibition causing AML cell cytotoxicity
additional_notes: Active in FLT3-ITD models; synergy with other agents reported

mechanism: Blocks nuclear export (XPO1/CRM1), inducing anti-leukemic activity
additional_notes: Broad AML activity including MOLM-13; clinical AML trials conducted

mechanism: Pan-HDAC inhibition leading to apoptosis/differentiation in AML cells
additional_notes: Potent in AML lines; MOLM-13 included in datasets

mechanism: HDAC inhibition producing anti-proliferative and pro-apoptotic effects
additional_notes: Also known as SAHA; approved for CTCL; studied with hypomethylators in AML

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial translation/respiration to impair AML cell viability
additional_notes: Effective in primary AML and MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial electron transport complex III (OXPHOS inhibition)
additional_notes: Targets OXPHOS-dependent AML; activity shown in FLT3-ITD models

mechanism: Induces lysosomal dysfunction leading to apoptosis in AML cells
additional_notes: Activity observed in MOLM-13 and primary AML blasts

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, increases ROS, induces apoptosis
additional_notes: Active in FLT3-ITD AML; synergy with cytarabine/ATM inhibitors reported

mechanism: Copper-enhanced proteasome/NPL4 inhibition; ALDH inhibition
additional_notes: Potency typically sub- to low-micromolar in presence of physiologic copper; higher without added copper; numeric range inferred from phrasing as exact values were not provided in the text

mechanism: Inhibits Wnt/STAT3/mTOR signaling and uncouples mitochondria
additional_notes: Activity reported in FLT3-ITD AML models

mechanism: Chelates iron and inhibits ribonucleotide reductase, causing apoptosis and cell-cycle arrest
additional_notes: Active in AML lines including MOLM-13; preclinical AML models show activity

mechanism: Iron deprivation reduces AML proliferation and induces apoptosis
additional_notes: Active across multiple AML lines including FLT3-ITD models

mechanism: Inhibits STAT5 signaling downstream of FLT3-ITD; calmodulin/calpain effects
additional_notes: Active in MOLM-13/MV4-11 with apoptosis induction; QT risk class noted in general

mechanism: Induces ER/proteotoxic stress, affects UPR and PI3K/AKT signaling
additional_notes: Cytotoxic to AML lines; enhances proteasome inhibitor activity

mechanism: Inhibits SRC-family kinases, ABL, KIT; attenuates some FLT3 signaling
additional_notes: Anti-proliferative in AML lines including MOLM-13 in some reports; often stronger in combinations
